calculateReputation(uint256).notice: Calculate full reputation score for an agent

flagMutualVerification(uint256,uint256).notice: Flag mutual verification between two agents — penalizes both

getDecayMultiplier(uint256).notice: Get current decay multiplier (10000 = no decay, 0 = max decay)

getTier(uint256).notice: Get tier based on current reputation

recordActivity(uint256).notice: Record activity to reset decay timer (only authorized contracts/owner)

recordJobValue(uint256,uint256).notice: Record escrow value for a completed job (called by escrow contract)

registerAgent(uint256).notice: Register an agent's creation time (called once at mint)
